empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please give me more details on when did you notice these double charges occurred so we can investigate it further ? We will definitely work towards resolving this issue promptly .
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my recent credit card statement and I noticed that I've been charged twice for my monthly <PRODUCT>, which is associated with order number <ORDER_ID>. I've been a loyal customer for about 2 years now and I appreciate the service, but I'm a bit concerned about the duplicate charge of $49.99. Could you please look into this and provide a refund for the extra charge as soon as possible? Thank you for your help with this matter, I look forward to hearing back from you.
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: Can you please give me more details on when did you notice these double charges occurred so we can investigate it further ? We will definitely work towards resolving this issue promptly .

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the issue immediately and process any necessary adjustments on your account within the next few business days. Please allow up to 7-10 working days for the correction to be reflected in your next billing cycle. If there are any further questions or concerns, feel free to contact us again at your earliest convenience.
